mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, u.avatar FROM sys_player_show_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.show_id = #{showId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

where.if: AND (c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, u.username, u.avatar FROM sys_player_show_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_player_show_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_player_show_comment (show_id, user_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{showId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW())
